title: NHS Health Check quarterly statistics: October to December 2024 offers and uptake
body: " This update contains data from 153 local authorities for October to December 2024 (quarter 3 for 2024 to 2025), and cumulative data from 1 April 2020 to 31 December 2024.  The data also includes amended statistics for 25 local authorities for April to September 2024 (quarter 1 and quarter 2 for 2024 to 2025).  For more information about NHS Health Check data, contact nhshealthcheck@dhsc.gov.uk. "
